testcase.name: Login Navia
testcase.system-out: Given User Navigate to Navia................................................passed When User Click login with client code......................................passed And User Enter Client Code..................................................passed And User Enter Password....................................................passed And User Click Agree CheckBox...............................................passed And User Click Login button.................................................passed And User Click Otp Verification and enter manualy...........................passed And User Click Login Again..................................................passed Then Next Page Shown........................................................passed

testcase.name: User Verify The Market Depth - Stock - functionality
testcase.system-out: When Navigate To Home Page..................................................undefined And User click the search box...............................................skipped And User Search any "RELIANCE-A" Script by "BSE"............................skipped And User Navigate The "BSE" and "RELIANCE INDUSTRIES LTD" Stock.............skipped And User Verify The "BSE" Market Depth Options "Today Open" Value...........skipped And User Verify The "BSE" Market Depth Options "Yesterday close" Value......skipped And User Verify The "BSE" Market Depth Options Days Range "Low" Value.......skipped And User Verify The "BSE" Market Depth Options Days Range "High" Value......skipped And User Verify The "BSE" Market Depth Options year Range "Low" Value.......skipped And User Verify The "BSE" Market Depth Options year Range "High" Value......skipped And User Verify The "BSE" Market Depth Options Daily price range "Min" Value.skipped And User Verify The "BSE" Market Depth Options Daily price range "Max" Value.skipped Then User Close The Current Window..........................................skipped

testcase.name: User Verify The Market Depth - Stock - functionality
testcase.system-out: When Navigate To Home Page..................................................undefined And User click the search box...............................................skipped And User Search any "BEL-EQ" Script by "NSE"................................skipped And User Navigate The "NSE" and "BEL" Stock.................................skipped And User Verify The "NSE" Market Depth Options "Today Open" Value...........skipped And User Verify The "NSE" Market Depth Options "Yesterday close" Value......skipped And User Verify The "NSE" Market Depth Options Days Range "Low" Value.......skipped And User Verify The "NSE" Market Depth Options Days Range "High" Value......skipped And User Verify The "NSE" Market Depth Options year Range "Low" Value.......skipped And User Verify The "NSE" Market Depth Options year Range "High" Value......skipped And User Verify The "NSE" Market Depth Options Daily price range "Min" Value.skipped And User Verify The "NSE" Market Depth Options Daily price range "Max" Value.skipped Then User Close The Current Window..........................................skipped Then Next Page Shown........................................................skipped

testcase.name: User Verify The Market Depth - Feature - functionality
testcase.system-out: When Navigate To Home Page..................................................undefined And User click the search box...............................................skipped And User Search any "CRUDEOIL" Script by "MCX"..............................skipped And User Navigate The "MCX" and "CRUDEOIL" Stock............................skipped And User Verify The "MCX" Market Depth Options "Today Open" Value...........skipped And User Verify The "MCX" Market Depth Options "Yesterday close" Value......skipped And User Verify The "MCX" Market Depth Options Days Range "Low" Value.......skipped And User Verify The "MCX" Market Depth Options Days Range "High" Value......skipped Then User Close The Current Window..........................................skipped

testcase.name: User Verify The Market Depth - Stock - functionality
testcase.system-out: When Navigate To Home Page..................................................undefined And User Open The Current "Nifty 50" Stike..................................skipped And User Verify The "NFO" Market Depth Options "Today Open" Value...........skipped And User Verify The "NFO" Market Depth Options "Yesterday close" Value......skipped And User Verify The "NFO" Market Depth Options Days Range "Low" Value.......skipped And User Verify The "NFO" Market Depth Options Days Range "High" Value......skipped
